title: Indian hyperlocal diagnostic chain — hub-and-spoke logistics
description: Indian regional diagnostic chain (18 sites: 4 central + 14 spoke, 210 inter-site courier runs/week @ ₹1800/run, 22% subspecialty out-referral with 72% retainable via digital signout). Core test case for hub_spoke_logistics and subspecialty_routing pillars, both of which have no analogue in DPA or Sectra.

comparative.dpa_coverage: missing — no hub-spoke logistics at all
comparative.sectra_coverage: partial — 'slide retrieval elimination' is the closest analogue but models internal retrieval, not inter-site transport
